_meta.title: NOVIQ Engine — AR-DRG Knowledge Base Seed Data: V11.0 New ADRGs
_meta.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Final Report, IHACPA, January 2023
_meta.description: Seed data for the three new ADRGs in V11.0. Covers deliverables 1.2 (hierarchy positions) and 1.3 (split profile corrections). Merge into the master ar_drg_knowledge_base.json under the 'adrgs' key.

statistical_baseline.note: RID = Reduction in Deviance. Measures % of cost variability explained by AR-DRG classification.

ecc_model_reference.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Technical Specifications, IHACPA (free public PDF)
pipeline: 1. Diagnosis exclusions — Appendix C Tables C1 (unconditional) and C2 (conditional)
2. Geometric mean cost model — multiplicative, per-ADRG, log-transformed, decay-fitted
3. DCL derivation — integer 0-5, per diagnosis × ADRG, empirical log-cost differential
4. ECCS calculation — sorted DCLs with 0.86 geometric decay (Section 4.5)
5. ADRG splitting — ECCS vs per-ADRG thresholds from Definitions Manual
ecc_model_reference.eccs_formula: ECCS(e) = SUM[ DCL(x_i, A) × (0.86)^(i-1) ] for i=1..n, DCLs sorted descending
ecc_model_reference.decay_rationale: Best statistical fit via nonlinear regression across all ADRGs. Tested range 0.83-0.88. Same value in V10.0 and V11.0.
ecc_model_reference.dcl_range: 0-5 integer, ADRG-specific. DCL=0 means no incremental resource impact within that ADRG.
ecc_model_reference.dcl_table_location: Embedded in licensed grouper software — NOT in public documents. Too large for manual publication.
ecc_model_reference.thresholds_location: Per-ADRG ECCS split thresholds in AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual (purchased, Lane Print).

versioning.errata_notes: Errata 1 (1 April 2023) corrected ECCS thresholds for mental health ADRGs V60, V61, V62. Does not affect B08, F25, G13.
versioning.immutability_principle: This KB file is immutable per version. Create new file for V12.0 (proposed effective 2026-07-01).
versioning.v12_warning: AR-DRG V12.0 proposed live date: 1 July 2026 — approximately 3 months from current build date. Version-aware architecture required in grouper.py.

chain_of_truth.description: The full ECC Model pipeline — each step feeds the next. Breaking any link compromises RID.

steps.name: Data preparation + outlier trimming
steps.method: L3H3 (ALOS÷3 to ALOS×3) for most DRGs; L1.5H1.5 for MDC 19/20 mental health. Multi-stage cost trimming: low-cost floor ≤$23, ranking-based extreme jumps >200% increase/>75% drop, regression-based cost ratio filters.

steps.name: Geometric mean cost modelling
steps.method: Gamma GLM with log-link. Log-link preferred: guarantees positive predictions, multiplicative interpretation, aligns with 0.86 decay. Modified Park test (λ≈2) justifies gamma family for skewed hospital costs.

steps.name: DCL derivation via Appendix B aggregation
steps.method: Hierarchical precision levels: diagnosis within ADRG/CDC → broader pools if <100 episodes. Weighted cumulative avg of log cost differentials. Stabilised vs V10.0 (min ±0.2 to change). Rounded 0-5 integer. Result: pre-computed DCL table embedded in licensed grouper software only.

steps.name: Exclusions application
steps.method: Appendix C Table C1 (unconditional — always DCL=0) and Table C2 (conditional — DCL=0 only when related definitive diagnosis present). Aligns with ACS 1802 Signs and Symptoms. R00-R99 heavily restricted. Applied BEFORE DCL lookup.

steps.name: ECCS calculation
steps.method: ECCS = SUM[DCL_i × 0.86^(i-1)], DCLs sorted descending. Decay factor 0.86 global constant — confirmed Section 4.5 Technical Specifications. Principal diagnosis included.

steps.name: RID-guided threshold determination
steps.method: Simulate all ECCS thresholds (0-3 splits). Select optimum: highest RID meeting DRG principles (≥200 eps/yr, ≥$1M cost, ≥10% ADRG, >$3700 cost change, inverse complexity trend). Adopt split only if RID gain >5%. Final thresholds in Definitions Manual only.

steps.name: Final DRG assignment
steps.method: Compare episode ECCS to stored ADRG threshold → suffix A/B/C/D/Z. Output: FHIR-compatible GrouperResult with eccs, dcl_contributions, threshold_used, arDrgVersion, errataApplied.

fhir_output_schema.description: Standardised GrouperResult output — FHIR R4 compatible per Doc #11

dcl_contribution_schema.exclusionReason: string — e.g. 'Appendix C Table C1 / ACS 1802'

B08.mdc_description: Diseases and Disorders of the Nervous System

hierarchy.position_rationale: Ranked 2nd in MDC 01 intervention hierarchy. B02 Cranial Interventions ranks 1st (higher cost). B08 episodes that also meet B02 criteria group to B02, not B08.

split_profile.source: Section 3.1 — ADRG splitting review selected optimum threshold of 3, resulting in A and B DRGs
split_profile.correction_note: CONFIRMED: B08 has exactly 2 end classes (A, B). Not 3. Deliverable 1.3 — split profile verified against V11.0 Final Report Section 3.1.

B08.sex_conflict_test_note: Removed globally in V11.0 per Section 3.5.2

ecc_model.dcl_derivation_basis: Empirical log-cost differential (actual vs geometric-mean-model predicted), standardised per ADRG, stabilised vs V10.0 (min ±0.2 change), rounded to integer.
ecc_model.dcl_zero_meaning: Diagnosis adds no meaningful additional resource use within this ADRG beyond baseline predicted by diagnosis count.
ecc_model.eccs_formula: ECCS = SUM[ DCL_i × 0.86^(i-1) ], DCLs sorted descending, principal diagnosis included
ecc_model.dcl_lookup_source: Pre-computed tables in licensed grouper software

grouper_logic_notes: Step 2 (Pre-MDC): B08 is NOT a Pre-MDC ADRG.
Step 3 (MDC): PDX must assign episode to MDC 01.
Step 4 (ADRG): Check ACHI 35414-00 present. If B02 criteria also met, B02 wins (hierarchy).

F25.adrg_description: Percutaneous Heart Valve Replacement with Bioprosthesis
F25.mdc_description: Diseases and Disorders of the Circulatory System

hierarchy.position_rationale: Position 13 in MDC 05 intervention hierarchy. Percutaneous approach is clinically and cost-distinct from open cardiac valve surgery (F03, F04) which rank higher.

end_classes.drg_description: Percutaneous Heart Valve Replacement with Bioprosthesis, Major Complexity
end_classes.confirmation_status: CONFIRMED — DRG code and description verified via NZ health data reference sourced from AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual
end_classes.threshold_status: BLOCKED — exact numeric ECCS threshold documented only in Definitions Manual (Lane Print, Volume 1, MDC 05 section). Not in any free public document.

end_classes.drg_description: Percutaneous Heart Valve Replacement with Bioprosthesis, Minor Complexity
end_classes.confirmation_status: CONFIRMED — DRG code and description verified via NZ health data reference sourced from AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual
end_classes.threshold_status: BLOCKED — same as F25A. Value is the mirror of F25A threshold.

split_profile.eccs_decay_note: ECCS = sum of DCLs (0–5 per in-scope diagnosis) sorted descending, with decay factor 0.86 applied to each successive term. Formula: ECCS = DCL1 + 0.86*DCL2 + 0.86²*DCL3 + ... Confirmed in AR-DRG V11.0 Technical Specifications (free public document).
threshold_resolution_options: OPTION A (authoritative): Purchase AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual, Volumes 1–3 via Lane Print at ar-drg.laneprint.com.au. Check F25 definition page in Volume 1 (MDC 05 intervention ADRGs) or ECCS split tables.

OPTION B (empirical): If licensed grouper software is available, run test episodes with known DCL profiles against F25 to observe the A/B split point. Cross-reference with comparable ADRGs — e.g. B70 uses >= 4.0 (from Final Report), B08 uses >= 3 (confirmed). F25 threshold is likely in the range 2.0–5.0.
OPTION C (IHACPA direct): Contact IHACPA directly for licensed access, citing grouper/knowledge base implementation use case.

B08.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Final Report Section 3.1 — confirmed

B70.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Final Report Section 1.3 — confirmed

comparable_thresholds_for_reference.note: Thresholds vary by ADRG and cannot be generalised. F25 threshold must come from the Definitions Manual.

split_profile.production_gate: HARD BLOCK — grouper.py Step 5 must refuse to assign F25A or F25B and raise a KnowledgeBaseIncompleteError until eccs_threshold.value is populated. Do not default to a guessed value.
split_profile.source: Section 3.2 and Table 4 — F25 A/B split confirmed. ECCS decay formula from Technical Specifications. DRG codes confirmed via NZ reference. Numeric threshold requires Definitions Manual purchase.

eccs_architecture.step_1: Apply DCL exclusions from dcl_exclusions.json (Appendix C Tables C1+C2)
eccs_architecture.step_2: Look up pre-computed DCL (0-5) for each eligible diagnosis in ADRG F25
eccs_architecture.step_5: Compare ECCS to F25 threshold (NULL — requires Definitions Manual purchase)
eccs_architecture.step_5_note: F25A if ECCS >= threshold, F25B if ECCS < threshold

F25.sex_conflict_test_note: Removed globally in V11.0 per Section 3.5.2

ecc_model.dcl_derivation_basis: Empirical log-cost differential (actual vs geometric-mean-model predicted), standardised per ADRG, stabilised vs V10.0 (min ±0.2 change), rounded to integer.
ecc_model.dcl_zero_meaning: Diagnosis adds no meaningful additional resource use within this ADRG beyond baseline predicted by diagnosis count.
ecc_model.eccs_formula: ECCS = SUM[ DCL_i × 0.86^(i-1) ], DCLs sorted descending, principal diagnosis included
ecc_model.dcl_lookup_source: Pre-computed tables in licensed grouper software

grouper_logic_notes: Step 2 (Pre-MDC): F25 is NOT a Pre-MDC ADRG.
Step 3 (MDC): PDX must assign episode to MDC 05.
Step 4 (ADRG): Check any of the four 38488-xx ACHI codes present. Hierarchy position 13 — most cardiac intervention ADRGs rank above F25.
Step 5 (DRG): ECCS threshold TBC from Definitions Manual — placeholder null values must be replaced before production use.
IMPORTANT: Valvuloplasty codes (38270-xx, 96222-00) do NOT trigger F25. These were removed from F05/F06 but are not F25 triggers.

G13.mdc_description: Diseases and Disorders of the Digestive System

hierarchy.position_rationale: Ranked 1st in MDC 06 intervention hierarchy — highest position due to high cost profile of peritonectomy + HIPEC combination.

end_classes.note: Z suffix = single end class, no complexity split applied.

split_profile.no_split_rationale: Episode volume in MDC 06 exceeded 200/year threshold for ADRG creation but was insufficient for ECCS-based complexity splitting. ADRG splitting review recommended no split for G13.
split_profile.source: Section 3.3 — 'The ADRG splitting review has recommended no split for G13 due to the low volume of episodes within the ADRG.'
split_profile.correction_note: CONFIRMED: G13 has exactly 1 end class (G13Z). No A/B split. Deliverable 1.3 — verified against V11.0 Final Report Section 3.3.

G13.sex_conflict_test_note: Removed globally in V11.0 per Section 3.5.2

ecc_model.dcl_derivation_basis: Empirical log-cost differential (actual vs geometric-mean-model predicted), standardised per ADRG, stabilised vs V10.0 (min ±0.2 change), rounded to integer.
ecc_model.dcl_zero_meaning: Diagnosis adds no meaningful additional resource use within this ADRG beyond baseline predicted by diagnosis count.
ecc_model.eccs_formula: ECCS = SUM[ DCL_i × 0.86^(i-1) ], DCLs sorted descending, principal diagnosis included
ecc_model.dcl_lookup_source: Pre-computed tables in licensed grouper software
ecc_model.note: G13 is unsplit (Z suffix). ECCS computed but does not determine DRG assignment. Reported in physician review output for clinical context.

hipec_flag.description: Presence of ACHI 96201-00 (HIPEC) and 92178-00 (heat therapy) alongside 96211-00 (peritonectomy) confirms the higher-complexity MDC 06 cohort. Should surface as a clinical complexity flag in physician review output.
hipec_flag.clinical_significance: MDC 06 peritonectomy + HIPEC is significantly more expensive than MDC 13 peritonectomy without HIPEC. Clinically distinct cohorts confirmed by CCAG.

grouper_logic_notes: Step 2 (Pre-MDC): G13 is NOT a Pre-MDC ADRG. Pre-MDC placement was considered but rejected due to episode volume constraints.
Step 3 (MDC): PDX must assign episode to MDC 06. Peritonectomy in MDC 13 does NOT route to G13.
Step 4 (ADRG): Check ACHI 96211-00 present AND episode in MDC 06. Hierarchy position 1 — G13 wins over all other MDC 06 intervention ADRGs.
Step 5 (DRG): Always assigns G13Z — no ECCS threshold check required for DRG assignment. ECCS still computed for reporting.

G01.mdc_description: Diseases and Disorders of the Digestive System

split_profile.source: AR-DRG V11.0 — empirical threshold (purchase Definitions Manual for exact value)
split_profile.note: Threshold 2.0 is empirical approximation pending Definitions Manual purchase

grouper_logic_notes: Step 5: ECCS >= 2.0 → G01A (major complexity), ECCS < 2.0 → G01B (minor)
Uncomplicated appendicitis in young healthy patient = G01B (ECCS ~0)

split_profile.source: Empirical — purchase Definitions Manual for exact threshold

sex_as_classification_variable.description: Only R10.2 (Pelvic and perineal pain) still requires patient sex to route between MDC 12 and MDC 13. All other sex-dependent PDX codes were resolved in V11.0 via ICD-10-AM Twelfth Edition new codes or MDC relocation.
sex_as_classification_variable.grouper_action: If PDX = R10.2, check patient sex: Male or Other → MDC 12, Female or Other → MDC 13.

error_drgs.trigger: Data validity failure in demographic/clinical edits
PDX code is not acceptable as a principal diagnosis

error_drgs.description: Neonatal Diagnosis Not Consistent with Age/Weight
error_drgs.trigger: Neonatal diagnosis code conflicts with patient age or admission weight

m04_split_change.note: M04 Testes Interventions changed from Z (no split) in V10.0 to A/B split in V11.0. Only ADRG to change split count between versions.
m04_split_change.action_required: Update M04 split profile if/when MDC 12 is added to the Knowledge Base.

dcl_system.net_change: +27 net (47 excluded, ~74 newly added including COVID codes and antimicrobial resistance expansions)
dcl_system.grouper_runtime: DCL values are PRE-COMPUTED during classification development. Grouper performs table lookup at runtime — does NOT recalculate DCLs.
dcl_system.full_dcl_table_location: Embedded in licensed grouper software only. Not in Definitions Manual, Technical Specifications, or Final Report.

r_code_exclusions.description: ICD-10-AM Chapter 18 (R00-R99) codes are heavily restricted in the ECCS model per ACS 1802 and Appendix C
r_code_exclusions.acs_1802_rule: Do not code symptoms/signs as additional diagnoses if integral to or routinely associated with a definitive diagnosis already coded.
unconditional_examples: R03.0 Elevated BP without hypertension diagnosis
r_code_exclusions.conditional_example: R06.0 Dyspnoea — excluded ONLY when a respiratory disease (e.g. J44.9 COPD) is co-present in the episode. If no respiratory disease present, may receive non-zero DCL.
r_code_exclusions.implementation_order: Apply Appendix C exclusion check BEFORE DCL lookup — not after. Conditional check requires full episode diagnosis list at time of evaluation.
r_code_exclusions.full_lists_location: Appendix C Table C1 (unconditional) and Table C2 (conditional) in AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual Volume 3, pages ~168 and ~193 respectively.

B70A.description: Stroke and Other Cerebrovascular Disorders, Major Complexity
B70A.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Final Report Section 1.3 — confirmed public

V62.description: Alcohol Use and Dependence, Major Complexity
V62.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Errata 1, April 2023 — adjusted value
V62.errata_note: V62 threshold was corrected in Errata 1. B08 threshold (3.0) confirmed from Final Report Section 3.1.

B08A.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Final Report Section 3.1 — confirmed public

F25A.description: Percutaneous Heart Valve Replacement with Bioprosthesis, Major Complexity
F25A.empirical_range_note: Comparable ADRGs suggest range 2.0-6.0. TAVI complexity profile (pacemaker, PVL, vascular complications) suggests moderate-to-high threshold. Cannot be guessed — hard block in place.

drg_splitting_principles.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Governance Framework + Technical Specifications Section 5

principles.description: Each final DRG must have at least 200 episodes per year (exceptions for low-volume ADRGs)
Each final DRG must have a minimum total cost of $1 million per year
Each final DRG must represent at least 10% of episodes within the ADRG
Absolute change in mean cost between consecutive DRGs must be at least $3,700
Relative change in mean cost between consecutive DRGs should be at least 2x (flexible — meeting 4 or 5 may suffice)
Inverse trend: higher complexity DRGs should have fewer episodes

drg_splitting_principles.rid_adoption_rule: Adopt split only if modelled RID gain >5% relative to simulation with one fewer split
drg_splitting_principles.rid_note: 64.2% overall RID for V11.0 on trimmed national cost data 2015-16 to 2018-19. Development-time metric only — NOT computed at runtime.

integration_instructions.merge_strategy: Add B08, F25, G13 objects into the top-level 'adrgs' key. Add global_v11_flags at the top level.
integration_instructions.threshold_placeholder_warning: F25 ECCS threshold values are NULL — must be populated from AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual before production grouper use. B08 threshold (3) is confirmed from Final Report.
integration_instructions.grouper_dependency: grouper.py Step 4 reads hierarchy.position to determine ADRG evaluation order within each MDC. Step 5 reads split_profile.end_classes[].eccs_threshold to assign final DRG.
